类 FastArrayList<T>

java.lang.Object
com.zenith.util.struct.FastArrayList<T>
直接已知子类:
SortedFastArrayList
public class FastArrayList<T> extends Object
An ArrayList implementation optimized for fast, direct, array access. Modifications have greatly increased overhead, implemented as copy-on-write For best performance, this list should be rarely mutated This class implements a very limited subset of the List interface, it's not intended to be a drop-in replacement for ArrayList or List
